title: Product Solutions
subtitle: Deep into business scenarios, providing product and service combinations

items.title: Unified Data Intelligence Platform
items.subtitle: Data ontology construction, discovering hidden value and deep relationships
items.description: For government and enterprise digital scenarios, breaking data silos to build a secure, standard, shareable, and evolvable enterprise intelligent data foundation.

items.title: Knowledge Graph Engine
items.subtitle: Building intelligent business relationship networks for deep decisions
items.description: Based on knowledge graph and semantic modeling, constructing entity relationship networks, mining hidden data connections, supporting complex business analysis and intelligent reasoning.

items.title: Intelligent Dispatch Engine
items.subtitle: Data-driven intelligent decisions for unified command and dispatch
items.description: Based on data and knowledge capabilities, achieving optimized resource allocation and dynamic scheduling, supporting emergency management and real-time command in complex scenarios.

items.title: Digital Twin Simulation Platform
items.subtitle: Digital twin technology and model reasoning for full-scenario analysis and forward-looking decisions
items.description: Building high-fidelity digital twin models, supporting multi-scenario simulation and risk prediction, providing scientific support for planning research, emergency drills, and forward-looking decisions.
